nasb.text: And I will strengthen them in the Lord, And in His name they will walk,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: I will make them strong in the Lord, and they shall walk in his name,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必使我的子民因耶和華而強盛， 他們要奉耶和華的名行事為人。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我必让他们靠着我强盛， 他们必奉我的名行事。 这是耶和华说的。”
